title: Create: Numismatic Coins
description: Create your Spurs from Numismatic Overhaul coins (and vice versa)
body:
This datapack (or mod, packaged by Modrinth) will let you use Create to make Spurs from Numismatic Overhaul coins. You can also craft Spurs/Cogs into coins, however, this is at a loss. I didn't spend any time figuring out if this was balanced or if any recipes looped into each other but it works for my server, so enjoy!

# Coins to Spurs
With this enabled you can use Create Compacting to form coins into spurs. All recipies require some amount of lava, a mechanic press into a basin (compacting), and are as follows:
### Spur
16 Copper Coins + 16 Copper Nuggets = 1 Spur  
![16 bronze coins and 16 copper nuggets to Ala Le Spur](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67e1763572f48e9ff7d552f983e097b5ae7bc547.png)
### Bevel
4 Spurs + 4 Silver Coins = 1 Bevel  
![4 spurs, 4 silver coins to a Bevel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8a28b63fa92de8ce69989d6d5a03ceb830ab409.png)
### Sprocket
1 Bevel + 4 Silver Coins = 1 Sprocket  
![one Bevel, 4 silver coins to a Sprocket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9843d2a7992e3bd4dbc4e25cd842f60b9fe1966.png)
### Cog
1 Sprocket + 1 Gold Coin = 1 Cog  
![one Sprocket and a gold coin to a Cog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6593e79d600f5473a27a3a88aa188f08ba56254c.png)
### Crown
2 Cogs + 2 Gold Coins = 1 Crown  
![two Cogs, 2 gold coins to a Crown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ab62be07b9667308bc41aee3575e22255a8aca5.png)
### Sun
2 Crowns + 2 Gold Coins + 1 Netherite Ingot = 1 Sun  
![Full lava, 2 Crowns, 2 gold coins, 1 netherite ingot into a Sun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d72a4507844be2d5dac1e8ad22b6363247fdb9a6.png)

# Spurs to Coins
Coins can be mixed from Spurs using heat, water, and some nuggets. Recipes are as follows:
### Spur to Bronze
1 Spur + 9 Copper Nuggets = 16 Bronze Coins
This is the only recipe thats technically not at a loss. It can also take any copper nuggets taged with `c:copper_nuggets`, so nuggets from mods like Hephaestus will also work.  
![spurt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4125ba3ed44a8b51fba025dcd786b47966a08341.png)
### Bevel to Silver
1 Bevel + 9 Iron Nuggets = 4 Silver Coins  
![1 bevel 9 iron nuggets to 4 silver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6769dbb5b93e7bfad4c83477cb575ce24a4b4f9f.png)
### Sprocket to Silver
1 Sprocket + 9 Iron Nuggets = 4 Silver  
![sprocket iron nuggets silver coin urggg i have to type these all outttt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bf76d507c89ea20a47dce5083ff435f9a6606e4.png)
### Cog to Gold
1 Cog + 9 Gold Nuggets = 1 Gold Coin  
![ONE WHOLE COG 9 GOLD NUGGETS TURNS INTO ONE WHOLE GOLD COIN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67268f3c3418b88e90a3ed6399589a458e043c59.png)
### Crown to Gold
1 Crown + 9 Gold Nuggets = 3 Gold Coins  
![we got the crown in the water pot with some gold nuggets turning into 3 whole gold coins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4926e468ef8914bb68c5c068a4216a3b98e2dfe.png)
### Sun to Gold
1 Sun + 18 Gold Nuggets = 8 Gold Coins (this also needs to be super heated)  
![THE SUN CONSUMES ITSELF 18 GOLD NUGGETS AND A TASTY BLAZE CAKE BURNS IT INTO 8 GOLD COINS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1166f927e354bfdc53c900d7b831fb8a03e69ad5.png)
